NAME: Homing Missiles
NOTES: Auto-fires tracking missiles. Stacks with meta upgrade to 4 missiles.

NAME: Volley Shot
NOTES: Automatic burst damage. No input required.

NAME: Chain Lightning
NOTES: Arc damage hits grouped enemies. Great vs swarms.

NAME: Reactive Shield
NOTES: Offensive play heals shields. Aggressive sustain.

NAME: Momentum
NOTES: Keep moving to maximize DPS. Hit-and-run style.
